name: io.github.sceneview/mcp
description: MCP server for building 3D and AR apps with SceneView. Provides API reference, code samples, setup guides, validation, and migration tools for Android (Jetpack Compose + Filament), iOS (SwiftUI + RealityKit), Web (Filament.js), and 6+ platforms.

tools.name: get_sample
tools.description: Get a complete working code sample for a SceneView feature (24 samples: Android, iOS, Web)

tools.name: list_samples
tools.description: List all available sample IDs and descriptions

tools.name: validate_code
tools.description: Validate SceneView code for threading, API, and style issues

tools.name: get_migration_guide
tools.description: Get migration guide between SceneView versions

tools.name: get_best_practices
tools.description: Get SceneView best practices and performance tips

tools.name: get_troubleshooting
tools.description: Get troubleshooting guide for common issues

tools.name: get_ios_setup
tools.description: Get complete iOS/macOS/visionOS setup guide (SPM, SwiftUI)

tools.name: get_web_setup
tools.description: Get complete Web setup guide (Filament.js, Kotlin/JS)

tools.name: get_node_reference
tools.description: Get detailed API reference for a specific node type

resources.name: SceneView API Reference
resources.description: Complete API reference — composables, node types, threading rules

resources.name: Open GitHub Issues
resources.description: Live list of open issues with workarounds
